title: Brazilian Smoked Chicken Tagine
description: A smoky twist on the classic North African dish, featuring Brazilian spices and marinated chicken.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together smoked paprika, chipotle peppers, tagine spice blend, and olive oil.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add the chicken and sear until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the chicken to a plate and set aside.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger to the pot and cook until the onion is softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chicken broth and honey to the pot and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the pot and cover with a lid.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and braise the chicken for 25-30 minutes, or until cooked through.
Remove the pot from the oven and let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the chicken with the sauce spooned over the top.
